subcodes.first_line: O surging sea, raise up a wave that shall reach the highest summit of the Supreme Concourse, and create such a tempest that its flood shall encompass both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بحر پر موج موجی برآر که باوج ملا اعلی رسد و طوفانی کن که فیضانش شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
